headline: Dupixent® (dupilumab) Approved in Japan as the First Targeted Medicine to Treat Adults with Bullous Pemphigoid (BP)
summary: Approval in moderate-to-severe patients was based on pivotal trial results showing over four times more Dupixent patients experienced sustained disease remission through Week 36 compared with placebo BP is a chronic, relapsing skin disease with underlying type 2 inflammation characterized by intense itch alongside painful blisters and other lesions BP is the seventh approved indication for Dupixent in Japan TARRYTOWN, N.Y. and PARIS, March 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regeneron Pharmaceuticals,
